findings.description: Application checks biometric availability via canEvaluatePolicy
findings.impact: Biometric authentication is available in this app
findings.recommendation: Verify biometric is combined with Keychain access control

findings.description: LAContext.evaluatePolicy used for biometric auth - trivially bypassable

evidence.bypass_methods: Frida hook, binary patch, ObjC swizzle

findings.impact: Client-side biometric check returns a simple BOOL that can be hooked to always return true
findings.recommendation: Bind biometric to Keychain with SecAccessControlCreateWithFlags + kSecAccessControlBiometryAny
